## Contribution type

## Validation

- [ ] `ruff check .`
- [ ] `pytest`
- [ ] `clear-lewm validate-submission path/to/submission.json` (results only)
- [ ] Result files use canonical manifests and include all episode outcomes.
- [ ] Dataset, checkpoint, runtime, solver, and environment provenance is public.
- [ ] No datasets, weights, credentials, private code, or machine paths are committed.
- [ ] Any protocol change updates the specification, tests, version, and migration note.
